subcodes.first_line: O ye two noble descendants of Abraham! Your letter was received and perused with careful attention, for it indicated [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو سلاله جلیله حضرت ابراهیم نامه شما رسید و بدقت ملاحظه گردید زیرا دلالت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @praise and encouragement, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
